title: Banking: Senior Officer- Cash (Swift and remittances) and Corporate e-bank operations (With Project Management)
description:
*Seeking for a talent with minimum 3 years of Cash Operations (including Swift and remittances) and Corporate internet-banking operations skills*

THE COMPANY

This bank is a highly reputable organization. They have a strong leadership and work culture. As they continue to expand their operations, they seek for a Senior Officer- Cash Operations to be part of their team.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Handle Cash operations (including Swift and remittances)
  • Prepare relevant Settlement and Cash reports
  • Participate in Settlements and Cash projects including corporate internet banking/ebanking function and system/UAT testing etc
  • Collaborate effectively with other internal and external stakeholders

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Degree Holders in Business, Finance, Accounting/Commerce (or any relevant education)
  • Minimum 3 years of experience handling Cash operations/remittances in a Bank
  • Knowledge in corporate internet banking services/corporate e-banking and hands on SWIFT exposure with project management skills
  • Meticulous, team player, strong interpersonal and communication skills

If you will like to explore this opportunity, please email your resume in Microsoft Word format to marie@resolutehunter.com

We thank you for your interest and will contact shortlisted candidates for more detailed discussion.

For more job openings, please visit our website at https://resolutehunter.com/opportunities/

EA Licence 18C9105

EA Reg R1105305

We are a team of certified and experienced Search professionals with an impeccable track record in their specialized fields.


We are RESOLUTE in our drive to cultivate valued partnerships with our clients and candidates. We make every experience count. Are you ready to make YOUR experience count, today?
